exploration_notes:
Investigation of the library scanning subsystem after the Trivy v0.27.1→v0.30.2 upgrade (commit 139f3a8) revealed incomplete adaptation. The key bugs are:

1. **Missing PNPM in LibraryMap** (models/library.go:135-153): `ftypes.PnpmLock` ('pnpm-lock.yaml') was NOT added to `LibraryMap`, so pnpm lockfiles are silently ignored during library scans despite the pnpm analyzer being registered (scanner/base.go:38).
